Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class OmniProcessElement

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.OmniProcessElement
public class OmniProcessElement extends Object

Java class for OmniProcessElement complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OmniProcessElement">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="childElements" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OmniProcessElement" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="designerCustomizationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="discoveryFrameworkUsageType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="embeddedOmniScriptKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isOmniScriptEmbeddable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="level" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="omniProcessVersionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="parentElementName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="parentElementType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="propertySetConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sequenceNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="uniqueIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getChildElements

      public List<OmniProcessElement> getChildElements()
      Gets the value of the childElements property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the childElements property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChildElements().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list OmniProcessElement

      Returns:
      The value of the childElements property.
